setupTasks.name: Install Cypress Dependencies
setupTasks.command: bash -c 'while sudo fuser /var/lib/dpkg/lock-frontend >/dev/null 2>&1; do sleep 2; done && sudo DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive apt-get update && sudo DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive apt-get install -y xvfb libgtk2.0-0 libgtk-3-0 libgbm-dev libnotify-dev libnss3 libxss1 libasound2 libxtst6 xauth'
